schemes.name: PM-KISAN
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi. An initiative by the government of India in which all farmers will get up to ₹6,000 per year as minimum income support.
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers holding cultivable land.
schemes.benefits: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each.

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana. A national public health insurance fund of the Government of India that aims to provide free access to health insurance coverage for low income earners.
schemes.eligibility: Economically weaker sections of society, identified through Socio-Economic Caste Census.
schemes.benefits: Health insurance cover of up to ₹5 lakhs per family per year.

schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana
schemes.description: Housing for All. An initiative to provide affordable housing to the urban poor with a target of building 20 million affordable houses.
schemes.eligibility: Economically Weaker Section (EWS), Low Income Group (LIG), and Middle Income Group (MIG).
schemes.benefits: Interest subsidy on home loans varying from 3% to 6.5%.

schemes.name: Startup India
schemes.description: Flagship initiative to build a strong eco-system for nurturing innovation and Startups in the country that will drive sustainable economic growth.
schemes.eligibility: Entity incorporated as a Private Limited Company or a Registered Partnership Firm.
schemes.benefits: Tax exemptions, easy compliance, and IPR support.

schemes.name: Mudra Loan
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana. A scheme to provide loans up to ₹10 Lakhs to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
schemes.eligibility: Any Indian citizen with a business plan for non-farm sector income generating activity.

schemes.name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana
schemes.description: Skill certification scheme that aims to train Indian youth in industry-relevant skills.
schemes.eligibility: Any Indian national, especially unemployed youth or school/college dropouts.
schemes.benefits: Free skill training, certification, and placement assistance.

schemes.name: Ujjwala Yojana
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana. Distributes subsidized LPG connections to poor households.
schemes.benefits: Free LPG connection with financial support of ₹1,600 per connection.

schemes.name: Digital India
schemes.description: A campaign to ensure the Government's services are made available to citizens electronically.
schemes.benefits: Digital access to various government services, broadband access.

schemes.name: Stand-Up India
schemes.description: Facilitates bank loans for setting up a greenfield enterprise.
schemes.eligibility: SC/ST and/or women entrepreneurs, above 18 years of age.
schemes.benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore.

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
schemes.description: A campaign to generate awareness and improve the efficiency of welfare services intended for girls.
schemes.benefits: Financial incentives for education and health of the girl child.

schemes.name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
schemes.description: A one-year life insurance scheme renewable from year to year offering coverage for death due to any reason.
schemes.eligibility: People in the age group of 18 to 50 years having a bank account.
schemes.benefits: Life cover of ₹2 lakhs at a premium of ₹436 per annum.

schemes.name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
schemes.description: An accident insurance scheme offering accidental death and disability cover.
schemes.eligibility: People in the age group 18 to 70 years with a bank account.
schemes.benefits: Risk coverage of ₹2 lakh for accidental death and full disability and ₹1 lakh for partial disability, premium is ₹20 per annum.

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana
schemes.description: A pension scheme primarily targeted at the unorganized sector.
schemes.benefits: Guaranteed minimum monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after 60 years of age.

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.description: A small deposit scheme for the girl child launched as a part of the 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign.
schemes.eligibility: Parents or legal guardians of a girl child up to 10 years of age.
schemes.benefits: High interest rate and tax benefits under Section 80C. Maturity on girl reaching 21 years of age.
documents: Identity and Address proof of Depositor

schemes.name: Make in India
schemes.description: An initiative to encourage companies to manufacture their products in India and incentivize dedicated investments into manufacturing.
schemes.eligibility: Domestic and foreign companies looking to invest/manufacture in India.
schemes.benefits: Tax benefits, easier compliance, infrastructure support.

schemes.name: Jal Jeevan Mission
schemes.description: Envisioned to provide safe and adequate drinking water through individual household tap connections by 2024 to all households in rural India.
schemes.eligibility: Rural households without a functional tap connection.
schemes.benefits: Functional Household Tap Connection (FHTC) providing clean drinking water.

schemes.name: PM Svanidhi
schemes.description: A special micro-credit facility for street vendors.
schemes.eligibility: Street vendors engaged in vending in urban areas as on or before March 24, 2020.
schemes.benefits: Working capital loan up to ₹10,000, subsidized interest rate.
documents: Vending Certificate/ID Card issued by Urban Local Body
